items.name: Village chief
items.description: A feeling of nostalgia, reminiscent of village gatherings and traditional night times. The village chief blends the ancestral spirit of palm wine with the warmth of spices and the subtleness of coconut cream. With the introduction of chilli pepper syrup, this cocktail offers a traditional yet modern harmony to your palette.

items.name: Up north
items.description: This drink is a sophisticated cocktail that celebrates northern flavors, blending the sweetness of dates and tangy tamarind with the warmth of ginger, black pepper and cloves. This bold yet refreshing drink, is perfect for slow enjoyment with an exotic comforting twist.

items.name: Fire cracker
items.description: The Fire Cracker is an electrifying cocktail that captivates with its fiery presentation, featuring a dramatic burst of flames. The bold, zesty flavors are elevated by a subtle spicy kick, creating a drink with both heat and excitement. Ideal for those who crave a visually stunning and adventurous experience.
